aliases.description: Aliases to add to the AA sequence

aminoAcids.description: Amino acids for the AA sequence.

annotations.description: Annotations to create on the AA sequence.

authorIds.description: IDs of users to set as the AA sequence's authors.

customFields.description: Custom fields to add to the AA sequence. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

fields.description: Fields to set on the AA sequence. Must correspond with the schema's field definitions. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the AA sequence.

schemaId.description: ID of the AA sequence's schema.
